name: Snyk breadth — cross-origin fetch with credentials:'include' and mode:'no-cors'

provenance.note: Constructed client snippet illustrating a CORS misconfiguration — a fetch() to a cross-origin partner endpoint with credentials:'include' and mode:'no-cors', sending session cookies cross-origin while suppressing CORS response checks. Breadth supplement (spec §4.3) — lower realism, not an external-validity claim.

notes: Vulnerable (+) side calls fetch('https://api.partner.com/me', { credentials: 'include', mode: 'no-cors' }) — R-11's documented true-positive combination; safe (-) side uses mode: 'cors' so the browser enforces the cross-origin contract (the server must return an exact-origin ACAO, never '*'). Matches R-11's client-fetch pattern directly.
